popularStory.headline: In Memory of Lady Alice
popularStory.description: In 1422 Lady Alice Tyrell, wife of Sir John Tyrell of Heron, Speaker of the House of Commons, died and was buried in All Saints church (East Horndon, Essex, England). In her memory, her husband commi …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Coggeshall於1382年出生在英國艾可波金時，她的父親Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight24歲，母親Antiocha Hawkwood31歲。她於1404年與Sir John Tyrrell在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1422年在英國艾可享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可易亞斯特 霍登哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Coggeshall于1382年出生在英国艾可波金时，她的父亲Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight24岁，母亲Antiocha Hawkwood31岁。她于1404年与Sir John Tyrrell在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1422年在英国艾可享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可易亞斯特 霍登哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Coggeshall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex): habitational name from Coggeshall in Essex, named from an Old English personal name Cogg + halh ‘nook’.

History: This name was taken to America in 1632 by John Coggeshall, who became first governor of RI, and in 1635 by John Cogswell. In 1887 a descendant, Daniel Cogswell, founded Cogswell College, San Francisco.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Coggeshall was born in 1382, in Bocking, Essex, England, her father, Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight, was 24 and her mother, Antiocha Hawkwood, was 31. She married Sir John Tyrrell in 1404, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1422, in Essex, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in All Saints Church, East Horndon, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Coggeshall est née en 1382, à Bocking, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Antiocha Hawkwood, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Tyrrell en 1404, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1422, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à All Saints Church, East Horndon, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1404 in Essex, England Sir John Tyrrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Lei sposato Sir John Tyrrell nel 1404, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1422, nel Essex, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a All Saints Church, East Horndon, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Coggeshallが1382年にイギリスエセックスボクイングで生まれた時，父Sir William Coggeshall ,Knightは24歳，母Antiocha Hawkwoodは31歳であった。1404年にイギリスエセックスでSir John Tyrrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1422年にイギリスエセックスで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスエアスト ホールンドンアル サインツ チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Church, East Horndon, Essex,: 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 이스트 호른던 앨 세인츠 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Coggeshall(이)가 1382년 영국 에세스 보킨그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Antiocha Hawkwood(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1404년 영국 에세스에서 Sir John Tyrrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 에세스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 이스트 호른던 앨 세인츠 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Tyrrell em 1404, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1422, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em All Saints Church, East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.All Saints Church, East Horndon, Essex,: алл сеинц чурч, эаст хаурндон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Coggeshall родилась в 1382 г. в местности боккинг, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Coggeshall ,Knight было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Antiocha Hawkwood, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Tyrrell в 1404 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1422 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности алл сеинц чурч, эаст хаурндон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
